translation: When the Inevitable [the Hour i.e. the time when the present world will end and the Hereafter begin] happens
None would there be to deny its happening –
That will make those down (dead and buried in the dust) rise.
When the earth will be shaken with a [terrible] shake
And the mountains will be crumbled with an [awful] crumbling
And become scattered dust
And you shall be [divided] into three categories
Then those on the right (righteous people) – how will those on the right be!
And those on the left (unrighteous people) – how will those on the left be!
And those in the front – those will be in the front!
Those will be the near ones (near to their Lord),
In the Gardens of Bliss.
Many from the earlier peoples
And a few from later times.
On couches embedded with gold and precious stones
Reclining on them, face to face one with another
Ageless youths serving them
[Serving] with vessels, jugs and a bowl of a pure original drink
They will not have a headache or will get drunk therewith
And [they will also be served] with [a variety of] fruits to choose from
And with meat of any fowl they desire
And [there will be] Houris with beautiful eyes
[The eyes] like pearls hidden in their shells
All this theirs as a reward for what they did

arabic: لَا يَسۡمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغۡوٗا وَلَا تَأۡثِيمًا
transliteration: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwan wala tatheeman
translation: No idle talk will they hear there, nor any sinful speech.
All talk being of good and peace.
And those people on the Right – how will those people on the Right be!
They shall be in the midst of trees [with fruit-bearing branches] bent down
And banana plants growing layers of fruit
And extended shade
And running water
And fruits abundant
Inexhaustive and unforbidden
And they shall be [comfortably seated on] raised couches.
We shall indeed have created them [female companions] into a new creation
And so shall have made them afresh
Loving and of same age group
For the People on the Right
Many [of them will be] from the earlier peoples
And many from later times.
And those People on the Left – how will those People on the Left be!
In hot wind and boiling water
And under the shadow of black smoke
Neither cool nor soothing
They had indeed been in luxury before
And they had persisted in the Great Retraction
notes: There is an inner conviction in every human being that he/she is created by One Powerful Creator Who has also created everything else in the Universe. And he/she intrinsically pledges his/her obedience to that One Creator. But most stray away from that pledge because of carnal desires generated under satanic influence. Remember how Adam and Eve were seduced by the Satan in retracting against their solemn pledge to Allah while they were living most comfortably in Paradise. Those first humans were thrown out into this world of trials and tribulations after their very first act of Retraction. But most of their progeny here, despite being given many chances, persist in the Great Retraction. The Verse here speaks of those wicked people.

arabic: وَكَانُواْ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابٗا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوثُونَ
transliteration: Wakanoo yaqooloona aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamabAAoothoona
translation: And they used to say, “Once we are dead and are reduced to dust and bones, shall we then be raised to a new life!?”
“And our fore-fathers too!?"
Tell them, “Indeed all – the forefathers as also the later generations!”
“They shall all be brought together on an appointed Day.”
Then you – those gone astray and those that denied the Truth –
You shall all eat from the Tree of Zaqqum
notes: Refer Verses 37:62 to 37:65 for a description of this tree in Hell.

translation: And you shall fill your bellies with it;
And then you shall drink boiling water thereupon
And drink it as thirsty camels do.
This shall be their welcome drink on the Day of Judgment!
We have created you, so why do you not accept the Truth?
Do you see what you ejaculate?
Are you its creator, or are We?

arabic: نَحۡنُ قَدَّرۡنَا بَيۡنَكُمُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوقِينَ
transliteration: Nahnu qaddarna baynakumu almawta wama nahnu bimasbooqeena
translation: We determine when and where any of you die and nothing can hinder Us

arabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمۡثَٰلَكُمۡ وَنُنشِئَكُمۡ فِي مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُونَ
transliteration: AAala an nubaddila amthalakum wanunshiakum fee ma la taAAlamoona
translation: From replacing you by others like yourselves, or from transforming you into beings you know nothing about.

arabic: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ ٱلنَّشۡأَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
transliteration: Walaqad AAalimtumu alnnashata aloola falawla tathakkaroona
translation: And you are well aware how you were brought into being the first time. Why, then, do you not sing the Creator’s praises?
Do you see what you sow?
Do you cause it [seed] to grow or do We?

arabic: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ حُطَٰمٗا فَظَلۡتُمۡ تَفَكَّهُونَ
transliteration: Law nashao lajaAAalnahu hutaman fathaltum tafakkahoona
translation: If We so wished, We could have reduced your harvest to rubble, and you would have been left exclaiming,
"We are certainly indeed ruined!”
“Nay; we are dispossessed!"
Have you seen the water that you drink?

arabic: ءَأَنتُمۡ أَنزَلۡتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُزۡنِ أَمۡ نَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُنزِلُونَ
transliteration: Aantum anzaltumoohu mina almuzni am nahnu almunziloona
translation: Do you send it down from the rain cloud or do We?

arabic: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ جَعَلۡنَٰهُ أُجَاجٗا فَلَوۡلَا تَشۡكُرُونَ
transliteration: Law nashao jaAAalnahu ojajan falawla tashkuroona
translation: Had We so willed, We could have made it bitter. So why are you not grateful?
Do you see the fire that you kindle?

arabic: ءَأَنتُمۡ أَنشَأۡتُمۡ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمۡ نَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُنشِـُٔونَ
transliteration: Aantum anshatum shajarataha am nahnu almunshioona
translation: Do you make the tree – which provided you with the firewood – grow, or do We?
We made it for a wayfarer in the desert to remember Allah [thereunder] and to get rest and refreshment.
Chant, then, the name of your Lord, the Almighty!

[The despicable attitude of the suppressors of the Truth about the Qur’aan and their grave misuse of it (see Verses 81 & 82 below)] then are not at all [correct]! I [Allah] do swear by the existence of the [innumerable] stars [in the sky]
– And it is indeed a mighty oath, if only you knew –
That this certainly indeed is a noble Qur´aan
In a Book, well-preserved
None but the pure touch it
notes: I.e., no impurities of human interpolations etc. can get sustained in it.

translation: A bestowal from the Lord of the Worlds.
notes: For the Qur’aanic meaning of the plural ‘worlds’, see study note 5 on Chapter 1.

translation: Do you, then, take this Hadeeth [Qur’aan] of such nobility lightly?
And you have made denouncing it [Qur’aan] as false, your bread and butter?
Why not then, when the last breath [of a dying man] comes up to the throat,
And you are at that time watching [helplessly]

arabic: وَنَحۡنُ أَقۡرَبُ إِلَيۡهِ مِنكُمۡ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُبۡصِرُونَ
transliteration: Wanahnu aqrabu ilayhi minkum walakin la tubsiroona
translation: And We are closer to him than you, and you do not see (Us)
Then if you are not to be brought to Judgment
[Why not then] you bring that [dead body] back to life if you are right?
notes: This Verse connects with Verse 83 above.

translation: So if he is one of those near [to Allah]
Then peace of mind and aromatic plants and Gardens of Bliss [are all his]!

arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ
transliteration: Waamma in kana min ashabi alyameeni
translation: And if he is one of the People on the Right
Then, "Peace to you" from the [other] Members of the Right. Waamma in kana mina almukaththibeena alddalleena

arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
transliteration: Waamma in kana mina almukaththibeena alddalleena
translation: And if he is one of those who deny [the Truth of this Message) and go astray
Then boiling water is his welcome drink
And scorching heat of the Fire [greets him].
That indeed is the Absolute Truth.
Chant, then, the name of your Lord, the Almighty!
